title: Loops
summary: Use loops to repeat a task multiple times.
content_html:
A for loop is commonly used when you need to iterate through a sequence of values.

for number in range(3):
    print(number)

exercises.title: Loop keyword
exercises.prompt: Which keyword is commonly used to iterate through each item?

exercises.title: Calculate a sum
exercises.prompt: Calculate the sum of the numbers from 1 to 5 and print the result.
